sources.content: Meridian Lab Motion supplies CO2 incubator shakers and microplate mixers for cell culture and sample preparation workflows. Target markets are the United States, Japan, and South Korea.
Catalog extract: the IC-180 incubator shaker supports an orbital diameter of 19 mm and a speed range of 30 to 300 rpm. The MP-24 microplate mixer accepts 24-well and 96-well plates.
